job.title: Machine Learning Engineer, Ranking
job.description: Build machine learning systems for candidate ranking, natural language processing, batch inference, model evaluation, and recruiter-facing recommendations. The role uses Python, PyTorch, SQL, AWS, and experiment design.

resume.text: Machine learning engineer with 4 years building NLP ranking systems in Python and PyTorch. Designed batch inference jobs on AWS and evaluated recommendation quality with recruiter feedback.
